generated_oml:
instance InternalTemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Internal DS18S20 temperature sensor (accuracy ±0.5°C from -10 to +85°C) measuring incubator internal temperature"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTempData1
]

instance InternalTemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Internal DS18S20 temperature sensor (accuracy ±0.5°C from -10 to +85°C) measuring incubator internal temperature"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTempData2
]

instance ExternalTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "External DS18S20 temperature sensor (accuracy ±0.5°C from -10 to +85°C) measuring ambient environment temperature"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ExternalTempData
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "214×214×3 mm heatbed controlled via MOSFETs for 4A current in thermal incubator system"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12V/24V fan providing 0.02 m³/s airflow in thermal incubator system"
]

instance StyrofoamBox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated box with 0.03 m³ air volume for thermal incubator system"
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller handling sensor communication and actuator control"
]

instance ControlPCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for signal isolation between Raspberry Pi GPIO and high-current actuators"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for thermal incubator system"
]

instance InternalTempData1 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTemperatureSensor1
]

instance InternalTempData2 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTemperatureSensor2
]

instance ExternalTempData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ExternalTemperatureSensor
]

instance InternalTemperatureData1 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw temperature data stream from internal sensor 1"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTempData1
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker, ScipyOptimization
]

instance InternalTemperatureData2 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw temperature data stream from internal sensor 2"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTempData2
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker, ScipyOptimization
]

instance ExternalTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw temperature data stream from external sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ExternalTempData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker, ScipyOptimization
]

instance ThermalModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "2-parameter thermal model for temperature dynamics prediction in incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimization
]

instance ThermalModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "4-parameter thermal model for temperature dynamics prediction in incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimization
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for real-time sensor data transmission to digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, TemperaturePredictionService, ParameterCalibrationService
]

instance ScipyOptimization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy optimization package for non-linear least squares calibration and prediction"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, ParameterCalibrationService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source GitHub repository for digital twin code management"
]

instance OneWireBusProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire bus protocol for sensor communication with Raspberry Pi GPIO"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service using calibrated thermal models (A/B) for temperature dynamics prediction"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight, AdjustHeatingAction, AdjustWaitingDurationAction
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for safety and optimal operation of thermal incubator"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoringInsight, SafetyCorrectiveAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for detecting faults in temperature sensors and actuator systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionResult
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for state estimation of incubator system parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

instance ParameterCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for parameter calibration using non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterCalibrationInsight
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for predicted temperature dynamics based on calibrated thermal models"
]

instance FaultDetectionResult : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault detection results for sensor or actuator anomalies in thermal system"
]

instance SafetyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety monitoring insight for temperature deviations beyond operational limits"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "State estimation insight for current system thermal parameters"
]

instance ParameterCalibrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Parameter calibration insight for thermal model accuracy optimization"
]

instance AdjustHeatingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of heatbed power based on temperature prediction insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustWaitingDurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of waiting durations for thermal equilibrium"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SafetyCorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Immediate corrective action triggered by safety monitoring for thermal runaway prevention"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains StyrofoamBox, Heatbed, Fan, InternalTemperatureSensor1, InternalTemperatureSensor2, ExternalTemperatureSensor, RaspberryPi4, ControlPCB, PowerSupply
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed) are transmitted from Digital Twin to Raspberry Pi controller via RabbitMQ messages, executed by low-level driver with safe protocol enforcement."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server for communication orchestration, low-level driver for hardware interaction, controller implementing bang-bang logic, and two thermal models for simulation; all components interacting via RabbitMQ message exchanges."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), as the Digital Twin integrates models and data from the deployed physical incubator system."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Assumptions validated via experiments (e.g., temperature uniformity tested with multiple sensors), model calibration minimizing residual error using non-linear least squares, Model B showing better thermal inertia prediction fidelity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ protocol for message-based communication between Physical Twin components and Digital Twin services, with RabbitMQ server hosted on Raspberry Pi."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hosting RabbitMQ server, controller software, low-level driver, and Digital Twin models."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol in low-level driver to maintain device safety, control limits (LL/UL) in bang-bang controller to prevent overheating, and MOSFETs for current isolation ensuring safe actuation."
]
